installCommand: if [ -f next.config.mjs ]; then npm install; elif [ -f application/package.json ]; then npm --prefix application install; else npm install; fi
buildCommand: if [ -f next.config.mjs ]; then npm run build; elif [ -f application/package.json ]; then npm --prefix application run build && cp -R application/.next .next; else npm run build; fi
devCommand: if [ -f next.config.mjs ]; then npm run dev; elif [ -f application/package.json ]; then npm --prefix application run dev; else npm run dev; fi
